overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from God of War showing Kratos walking through a snowy mountainous landscape during a storm with a massive lightning bolt striking in the distance. The character traverses from near a stone temple structure out into open snow fields and up a mountain slope.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy path near ancient stone temple

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the massive lightning bolt striking the mountain peak
exits the area near the stone temple structure into open snow field

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking steadily through deep snow away from the stone structure, occasionally glancing toward the massive lightning strike in the distance

entered.detail: Ancient stone building with arched doorway partially covered in snow and ice
Giant vertical lightning strike illuminating the sky and distant mountain peaks
Distant mountain peaks covered in snow and ice
Large ice-covered boulders and rock outcroppings

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks through deep snow near an ancient stone temple structure while a massive lightning bolt strikes the distant mountain peak. The camera tilts up to emphasize the scale of the lightning before the character moves away from the structure into more open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow valley between mountain ranges

events.description: massive lightning bolt fades from view as character moves past the strike location

agents.ego_description: Kratos continuing through the deep snow of the open valley, heading toward the distant mountains with steady pace

entered.detail: Wide snow-filled valley between rocky mountain slopes

segments.scene_description: Traversing the open snow valley between mountain ranges, the stone temple and lightning bolt disappear from view. The terrain remains flat and covered in deep snow with sparse vegetation and distant peaks visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending mountain trail with ice cliffs

events.description: terrain begins to ascend noticeably as character climbs higher elevation

agents.ego_description: Kratos climbing up the snowy slope, navigating around ice-covered rocks and higher elevation terrain toward the ridge

entered.detail: Steep ice and rock cliff wall with visible ice formations
High mountain ridge covered in snow

segments.scene_description: Kratos ascends a steeper snowy slope with ice cliff faces appearing on the right. The terrain becomes more enclosed and elevated as he approaches the snowy ridgeline, with the open valley now behind him.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dramatic encounter near an ancient ruin into a steady ascent up a frozen mountain slope. It begins with Kratos walking through deep snow beside a stone temple structure as a massive lightning bolt strikes a distant peak, the camera tilting upward to capture the scale of the storm. As the character moves away from the ruins, the scene opens into a wide, flat snow valley where the temple and lightning fade from view, leaving only sparse vegetation and distant peaks. The terrain then shifts from the open valley to a steeper incline, with jagged ice cliff faces appearing on the right. Finally, the camera follows the ascent as the environment becomes more enclosed and elevated, pushing toward a snowy ridgeline.
